LanguageData.PM_Backstory_SweeperChild.description: [PAWN_nameDef] emerged from the Mother, fully formed, shaped by Vital Fuel. Where others had a childhood, [PAWN_pronoun] knew only the red pulse of the incubator and the call to sweep.
LanguageData.PM_Backstory_SweeperChild.title: spawn of the Mother
LanguageData.PM_Backstory_SweeperAdult.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was forged for a single purpose: to clean. [PAWN_possessive] limbs instinctively know the weight of a Hook and the labor of deconstruction, inherited from the Vital Fuel [PAWN_pronoun] is made of.
LanguageData.PM_Backstory_SweeperAdult.title: sweeper of the Backstreets
